scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pap/contracts build && pnpm --filter @pap/shared build && pnpm --filter @pap/storage build && pnpm --filter @pap/memory build && pnpm --filter @pap/research build && tsc -b tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && vitest run test/research-capability.test.mjs
